query_text: Show attacks where the late runner provided enough support.
description: Reference clarification fixture for football language whose concept is plausible but underspecified.

anchor.summary: A possession event, pass reception, carry, or line-break-like action that could need support.

bind.summary: Ball carrier or receiver, candidate supporting teammates, and relevant support regions.

measure.summary: Measure support relation only after support definition, distance, lane, and timing assumptions are specified.

match.summary: Cannot decide pass/fail until enough support and arrival timing are defined.

outcome.summary: Potentially classify supported or unsupported attacks after clarification.

judge.summary: Ask for support definition and time window instead of over-refusing or inventing thresholds.

return.summary: Return typed clarification dimensions that the analyst can answer.

expected_input.name: support_definition
expected_input.description: Whether support means close option, same-lane option, behind-ball outlet, ahead-of-ball runner, or another relation.

expected_input.name: time_window
expected_input.description: How soon the support must arrive or remain available.

declared_gaps.claim_boundary: Support cannot be measured until its geometry and timing are specified.
declared_gaps.message: Clarification required: define support and the time window.
